title: Acorn (Un-set) MTG Card
description: Permissive schema for unhinged, rules-defying acorn-border cards. Almost anything goes — the only hard requirements are a name and border: "acorn". See UNHINGED_GUIDE.md.

border.description: Marks this as an un-card. Routes the card to this permissive schema instead of card.schema.json.

name.description: Card name. May be absurdly long, a full sentence, or punctuation soup.

subtitle.description: Optional second line under the name (titles, honorifics, disclaimers).

manaCost.description: Any string. {½}, {∞}, {🍕}, {Q}, or a prose cost like 'High-five a friend' are all fine.

manaValue.description: Number, or a joke string like "yes" / "∞" / "a lot".

type.description: Free-form type line. Pile on as many words as you like.

text.description: Rules text. Break every templating convention you want.

rarity.description: Any string, including "acorn" or made-up rarities.

chaos.description: Chaos dial 1 (slightly silly) to 5 (total nonsense). See UNHINGED_GUIDE.md.

extras.description: Bag for novel mechanics: physical actions, dice rolls, fourth-wall hooks, stickers, contraptions, etc. Any shape.
